---
title: "Contato"
editor: visual
---

Para entrar em contato, utilize o formulário abaixo.

```{=html}
<style>
  .contact-container {
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
  }

  input, textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    border: 1px solid #17c8d4;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 1rem;
  }

button {
  background-color: #0e0740;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  padding: 8px 8px; 
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
}
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;     
  justify-content: center;  
}
</style>
```

::: contact-container
<form action="https://formspree.io/f/xgvgnnpp" method="POST">

<label>Nome:</label> <input type="text" name="name" required>

<label>E-mail:</label> <input type="email" name="email" required>

<label>Mensagem:</label>

```{=html}
<textarea name="message" rows="6" required></textarea>
```

<button type="submit">

Enviar

</button>

</form>
:::
